generator.background_strategy: flat #ff00ff or close pink chroma-key requested; local ImageMagick key removal and normalization applied
notes: The fallback generator returned RGB PNGs even when transparent output was requested.
Final normalized PNGs are RGBA transparent proof candidates.

normalization.method: per-image corner color chroma-key removal, alpha trim, resize into fit box, bottom-align to y=302, transparent 320x320 extent

risks: minor chroma-edge risk around red roof highlights
style is proof-only and not final runtime scale locked

shared_risks: Generated raws are RGB and depend on local chroma-key cleanup rather than native transparency.
Fine-detail edges may retain tiny pink/magenta residue and should be manually polished before runtime approval.
These files are not art_target_locked, not runtime_visual_match, and not mapped into runtime systems.
